selector-class-pattern.message: Expected class selector "%(selector)s" to be kebab-case

custom-property-pattern.message: Custom properties must start with a token namespace (e.g. --text-primary).

at-rule-disallowed-list.message: At-rule "%s" is disallowed. Use custom properties or alternative techniques like @container instead.

declaration-property-value-allowed-list.message: Value "%s" is not allowed here. See @.claude/commands/css-guide.md

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Value "%s" for property "display" is disallowed. Avoid "display" layout values.

unit-disallowed-list.message: Unit "%s" is disallowed. Use cqi, rem, em, dvh, or % instead.

declaration-no-important.message: !important is not allowed. Use more specific selectors or refactor to avoid it.

max-nesting-depth.message: Maximum nesting depth exceeded (max %d). Refactor to reduce nesting.

selector-max-id.message: ID selector disallowed. Use classes or see @.claude/commands/css-guide.md

selector-disallowed-list.message: Selector pattern disallowed. Use classes or see @.claude/commands/css-guide.md

selector-max-specificity.message: Selector specificity exceeds allowed limit (max 0,2,0). Simplify the selector.

selector-max-compound-selectors.message: Too many compound selectors (max %d). Split into separate rules.

color-named.message: Named colors are not allowed. Use variable or alternative instead.

font-weight-notation.message: Font-weight should be numeric (e.g., 400, 700). Avoid keywords like 'bold'.

shorthand-property-no-redundant-values.message: Shorthand properties with redundant values are not allowed (e.g., use 'padding: 0' instead of 'padding: 0 0 0 0').

declaration-block-no-redundant-longhand-.message: Use shorthand properties where possible (e.g., 'padding' instead of 'padding-top', 'padding-right', etc.).

number-max-precision.message: Numbers should not exceed %d decimal places.

no-unknown-animations.message: Unknown animation name. Ensure the animation is defined with @keyframes.

no-descending-specificity.message: Avoid selectors that may override earlier rules unintentionally.

scale-unlimited/declaration-strict-value.message: Expected variable for "${property}", found "${value}". Use a custom property instead.
